case_title: AZIZI, FARAMARZ VS NGUYEN, PIERRE DBA NEXT INTERIOR

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO PIERRE NGUYEN OWNER NEXT INTERIORS RETURNED SIGNED.
